periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 70. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 2pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 86. West wind 7 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 70. West wind 6 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 80. North wind around 9 mph.
